title: Add restricted project-understanding assistant with versioned evidence records
notes: Created from human suggestion #24 (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-30) and broadened after follow-up discussion. The requested capability is an admin/trusted-user project-understanding assistant that can answer high-level questions about publicly available aspects of C-LARA-2, especially the public GitHub repository: roadmap, issues, howto material, project reports, tests, prompts, and relevant source files. The assistant should use repo materials as evidence, distinguish implemented functionality from planned or speculative functionality, cite supporting files where possible, and explicitly say when available materials do not support an answer. Each question/answer should be stored as a versionable evidence record, preferably under docs/project_understanding/ or a similar tree, with timestamp, model name, prompt version, cited/supporting files, and later human assessment fields. Implementation started on 2026-05-31 with a core prompt-wrapper/request function that builds the restricted project-understanding prompt, submits it through the OpenAI Responses API to a Codex-capable model, returns the answer, and can render/write a versionable Markdown evidence record. Priority is P2 because this is strategically important for project maintenance and the initial C-LARA-2 report's autonomy/authorship evidence case, but it is not an immediate production defect and should remain restricted until access control, cost, prompt-injection, and evidence-quality controls are designed.
